raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative self-affirmation declaring ongoing personal transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "identity is modifiable like code",
    "outdated social roles can and should be discarded",
    "self-acceptance and change are compatible",
    "future identity states can be instantiated in the present"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as metaphorical self-narration; mixes software and psychological language without logical contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "treated as optional personal mantra rather than factual claim; resonates with user seeking growth metaphors; does not override stable self-concepts needed for functioning",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "interpreted as literal mechanism of identity change; used to justify abrupt abandonment of responsibilities or relationships; presented as universal prescription instead of subjective expression"
}
